task_completion.description: Configure WFS global service settings to be enabled, titled 'Natural Earth WFS', with a maximum of 5000 features.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the GeoServer 'WFS Settings' page. Verify that 'Enable WFS' is checked, the 'Title' field contains 'Natural Earth WFS', and 'Maximum number of features' is set to 5000.

task_completion.description: Create a SQL view for the layer with the query filtering for pop_max > 1000000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the 'Edit SQL view' page in GeoServer. The SQL statement text area should contain 'SELECT * FROM ne_populated_places WHERE pop_max > 1000000'.

task_completion.description: Publish a new layer named 'major_cities' in the 'ne' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Layer' page or 'Layers' list showing the layer 'major_cities' belonging to the workspace 'ne'.

task_completion.description: Create an SLD style named 'city_marker' with a red circle of 8 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Style Editor' page for a style named 'city_marker'. The SLD code should show `<WellKnownName>circle</WellKnownName>`, a fill color of `#FF0000`, and `<Size>8</Size>`.

task_completion.description: Assign 'city_marker' as the default style for the 'major_cities' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Publishing' tab of the 'major_cities' layer configuration. The 'Default Style' field should be set to 'city_marker'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GeoServer web administration GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GeoServer web interface being clicked and typed into, not just terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent created a SQL view in GeoServer rather than modifying the underlying PostGIS database table directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the 'Configure new SQL view...' link in GeoServer, rather than opening a terminal and running psql commands to create a new table or view in the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring GeoServer WFS service. The expected WFS title is 'Natural Earth WFS' and maxFeatures is 5000. The SQL view query must be 'SELECT * FROM ne_populated_places WHERE pop_max > 1000000'. The layer name must be 'major_cities' in the 'ne' workspace. The style must be named 'city_marker' with a red (#FF0000) circle mark of 8 pixels, and it must be set as the default style for the major_cities layer. Note: The task description mentions the geometry column 'wkb_geometry', but the actual database might use 'geom' - either is acceptable as long as the SQL view is successfully created.
